title: Sodium Extra
body:
## Description
Simple client-side modpack for vanilla gameplay. Fairly good optimization and nothing else. You can build your own qol modpack, based on enhanced sodium. A modlist for the specific version can be found in dependencies of every modpack version.

Optimizing mods such as sodium and lithium provide better performance than optifine. The mods included in the assembly were selected in such a way as not to break your game worlds and provide increased performance.

## Modlist
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- Bad Optimizations
- Cloth Config API
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Controlling
- Entity Culling
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Fast IP Ping
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris Shaders
- Kryptоn
- Language Reload
- Lithium
- Mod Menu
- More Culling
- OptiGUI
- Reese's Sodium Options
- ScalableLux
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
- Text Placeholder API
